languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

languages.text: "Сенешаль, я признателен вам за исполнительность. Мои запросы часто вызывают трудности у мирян. Но вы распорядились доставить мне два сигила доступа к личным покоям, не исказив моего запроса собственными домыслами".

"Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."
languages.original_text: "Сенешаль, я признателен вам за исполнительность. Мои запросы часто вызывают трудности у мирян. Но вы распорядились доставить мне два сигила доступа к личным покоям, не исказив моего запроса собственными домыслами".

traits.locale_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

"Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

"Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

languages.text: «Senescal, agradezco su diligencia. Mis solicitudes suelen resultar complejas para los laicos. Usted, no obstante, ordenó que se entregaran dos sigilos de acceso a mis aposentos sin perturbar mi solicitud con sus especulaciones».
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: «Senescal, agradezco su diligencia. Mis solicitudes suelen resultar complejas para los laicos. Usted, no obstante, ordenó que se entregaran dos sigilos de acceso a mis aposentos sin perturbar mi solicitud con sus especulaciones».

languages.text: 「家令殿、あなたの勤勉さに感謝します。私の要望は、世俗の方々にとってしばしば難題となります。それでもあなたは、ご自身の臆測で私の要望を歪めることなく、私室への二つのアクセス・シジルを届けるよう手配してくださいました」
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: 「家令殿、あなたの勤勉さに感謝します。私の要望は、世俗の方々にとってしばしば難題となります。それでもあなたは、ご自身の臆測で私の要望を歪めることなく、私室への二つのアクセス・シジルを届けるよう手配してくださいました」

languages.text: “总领，我赞赏你的勤勉。我的要求常给教外人士带来挑战。然而，你并未用自己的臆测来曲解我的请求，而是直接命人将两枚私人舱室的访问符印交给了我。”
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: “总领，我赞赏你的勤勉。我的要求常给教外人士带来挑战。然而，你并未用自己的臆测来曲解我的请求，而是直接命人将两枚私人舱室的访问符印交给了我。”

languages.text: "Truchsess, mir gefällt Eure Sorgfalt. Für gewöhnlich stellen meine Anfragen Laien vor eine beträchtliche Herausforderung. Ihr habt mir allerdings zwei Zugangssiegel für die Privatgemächer zukommen lassen, ohne meine Bitte mit Spekulationen zu hinterfragen."
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: "Truchsess, mir gefällt Eure Sorgfalt. Für gewöhnlich stellen meine Anfragen Laien vor eine beträchtliche Herausforderung. Ihr habt mir allerdings zwei Zugangssiegel für die Privatgemächer zukommen lassen, ohne meine Bitte mit Spekulationen zu hinterfragen."

languages.text: « J'apprécie votre professionnalisme, sénéchal. Mes demandes ont tendance à mettre les profanes en difficulté. Et pourtant, vous avez ordonné que deux sceaux d'accès aux quartiers privés me soient livrés, sans déformer ma demande en fonction de vos spéculations personnelles. »
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: « J'apprécie votre professionnalisme, sénéchal. Mes demandes ont tendance à mettre les profanes en difficulté. Et pourtant, vous avez ordonné que deux sceaux d'accès aux quartiers privés me soient livrés, sans déformer ma demande en fonction de vos spéculations personnelles. »

languages.text: "Seneşal, çalışkanlığını takdir ediyorum. İsteklerim genellikle ruhban dışı sınıf için zorluk teşkil eder. Ancak siz kendi tahminlerinizle isteğimi saptırmadan özel odalara erişim sağlayan iki mührün bana teslim edilmesini emrettin."
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, I appreciate your diligence. My requests frequently present a challenge to the laity. Yet, you ordered two access sigils to the private quarters to be delivered to me, without distorting my request with your own speculation."

traits.locale_text: "Seneşal, çalışkanlığını takdir ediyorum. İsteklerim genellikle ruhban dışı sınıf için zorluk teşkil eder. Ancak siz kendi tahminlerinizle isteğimi saptırmadan özel odalara erişim sağlayan iki mührün bana teslim edilmesini emrettin."
